summary: Tested all 4 features: 1) Push notifications for team chat - 'Enable Notifications' button visible in Chat tab header 2) Employment Agreement template updated with all PDF fields (working hours, penalty clauses, salary payment terms) 3) PayrollCalculatorPage successfully refactored into 4 sub-components 4) Backend routes created in /app/backend/routes/ for modular structure

features_tested.feature: Connect Hub -> Chat tab - Push Notifications
features_tested.details: Enable Notifications button visible in Chat header. Uses browser Notification API. Button text changes to 'Notifications On' when enabled.
Chat shows messages from Super Admin and Staff User. Online staff list visible. Message input works.
Page loads with new component structure: EmployeeSelector, SalaryInputForm, DeductionBreakdown, SalarySummary. All data-testid attributes present.
Employee dropdown (data-testid='employee-selector'), Month selector, Year selector, Auto-Calculate from Attendance button visible
Total Monthly Salary (₹), Daily Allowance Rate (₹/day), Working Days/Month, Absent Days, Hours/Day, Late Hours inputs all functional
Absence Deductions and Hourly Deductions cards showing correct calculations
Form has 5 tabs: Company, Employee, Compensation, Terms, Penalty. All fields from PDF template present.
Working Hours field present in Employee tab (default: 9:30 AM - 6:30 PM)
Penalty tab has: Minimum Service Period (months), Minimum Penalty Amount, Employee Penalty Amount, Employer Penalty Amount
Compensation tab has: Salary Period (Monthly), Payment From (Day), Payment To (Day) with statutory deductions note
Routes created in /app/backend/routes/: auth.py, chat.py, employees.py, inventory.py, salary.py, superadmin.py with __init__.py

notification_service.status: Singleton pattern with requestPermission, showNotification, notifyNewMessage methods

files: __init__.py - Package initialization with all router imports
chat.py - Team chat routes (messages, online users)
employees.py - Employee CRUD routes with Pydantic models
salary.py - Salary calculator routes with auto-calculate
backend_routes_structure.note: Routes are documentation templates. Actual implementations remain in server.py for backward compatibility.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes are template/documentation files - actual implementations are in server.py. This is noted in route files.
NotificationService uses polling (3-second interval) for new messages - consider WebSocket for real-time updates in future
PayrollCalculator sub-components correctly export via index.js barrel file
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features implemented and working: 1) Push notifications button visible in Connect Hub Chat tab 2) Employment Agreement form has all PDF fields in 5 tabs (Company, Employee, Compensation, Terms, Penalty) 3) PayrollCalculatorPage refactored into 4 sub-components in /app/frontend/src/pages/PayrollCalculator/ 4) Backend modular routes created in /app/backend/routes/ as template files for future migration.
